overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves through a covered pink-and-blue neon arcade, ascends through a traditional red torii gate, and emerges into open urban streets with towering corporate billboards, wet reflective pavement, and diverse pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit pedestrian arcade with pink and blue lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade observing neon signs and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking ahead of the camera
person sitting on illuminated blue bench

entered.detail: overhead structure with pink and cyan fluorescent tube lighting
vibrant pink illuminated wall panels lining the corridor
long bench structure with bright cyan underlighting
large screen displaying a woman with pink hair and FUTURE text
black vending machine with red and white branding

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered pedestrian arcade bathed in vibrant pink and blue neon light. The camera moves forward past illuminated blue benches and vending machines while a woman in a red dress walks ahead. Digital billboards glow on the right wall as the corridor stretches into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional red torii gate structure with ascending concrete stairs

events.description: exiting covered arcade into open air at the base of a large red torii gate
beginning ascent of concrete stairs through the torii gate structure

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs through the red torii gate while looking up at surrounding glass towers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large traditional Japanese gate structure painted bright red
wide staircase ascending through the torii gate
tall futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades visible above

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the neon arcade and approaches a massive red torii gate marking the transition to an open area. Ascending the concrete stairs, the view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers against the morning sky while the neon corridor falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with corporate signage and descending ramp

events.description: emerging from torii gate into open plaza with full sky visibility
transitioning from flat ground to descending concrete ramp

agents.ego_description: walking down the ramp from the elevated plaza while observing the Militech sign and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking down the ramp
pedestrian in white outfit walking up the ramp against the flow

entered.detail: large red neon corporate signage for Militech
broad sloping walkway descending from the plaza level
tall palm tree visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the torii gate into bright daylight, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza dominated by a large Militech neon sign. The camera descends a concrete ramp alongside other pedestrians, with glass office towers rising on the right and palm trees visible against the clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with large advertisements and descending stairs

events.description: entering covered walkway section with large niiCOLA billboard visible
descending final flight of stairs to reach street level

agents.ego_description: walking through covered section with digital ads then descending stairs to the main street

notable_agents.action: large man in vest walking up the stairs against the camera's direction
black car driving on the street below

entered.detail: massive white advertisement with black text for niiCOLA
bright yellow seating structures along the right wall
vertical traffic signal visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway dominated by a massive niiCOLA billboard on the left wall. Descending stairs toward street level, pedestrians pass in opposing directions while yellow benches line the right side. The environment transitions from open sky to sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with food vendors and wet reflective pavement

events.description: emerging from covered walkway onto open city street with wet pavement
approaching food stall with bright neon OPEN signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street passing pedestrians and approaching a food stall with outdoor seating

notable_agents.action: person sitting on yellow bench looking at phone
vendor standing outside food stall gesturing

entered.detail: small structure with bright orange neon trim and OPEN sign
high-rise apartment buildings with multiple balconies
red and white striped barriers along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wet city street reflecting the surrounding neon lights. The camera walks past traffic barriers and tall residential towers, approaching a food stall with bright orange neon trim and an OPEN sign. Pedestrians populate the sidewalks while the wet pavement creates mirror-like reflections of the towering billboards above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched pedestrian corridor into a sprawling, high-tech urban center. It begins in a narrow arcade bathed in vibrant pink and blue light, moving past glowing vending machines and digital billboards. As the camera exits the corridor, it ascends concrete stairs through a massive red torii gate, where the enclosed neon space gives way to an open plaza dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and a large Militech sign under a bright morning sky. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a ramp and enters a sheltered walkway beneath a massive niiCOLA billboard, transitioning from the open air back into a structured urban passage. Finally, the movement leads onto a wet city street where the camera passes residential towers and traffic barriers toward a bright orange neon food stall, with the damp pavement reflecting the towering corporate lights above.
